description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:latest Docker image with a pip cache at .cache/pip and a cached virtualenv directory venv/. Define a global before_script that prints the Python version, installs virtualenv, creates a venv, activates it, and installs scrapy. Add a job named run in the default test stage that executes python Ejemplos/QuotesSpider.py. Add a job named test in the default test stage that executes python Ejemplos/QuotesSpider.py test. No artifacts, caches beyond the defined paths, or special rules are required.
